sources.excerpt: gpt-5.3-codex — Standard tier: Input $1.75 / 1M tokens, Cached input $0.175 / 1M tokens, Output $14.00 / 1M tokens
gpt-5.4-mini — Standard tier: Input $0.75 / 1M tokens, Cached input $0.075 / 1M tokens, Output $4.50 / 1M tokens

omitted.reason: Tiered by request input length (>272K input tokens: 2x input and 1.5x output for the full session), which the flat PriceRow schema cannot select honestly (SPEC-0005 R1). It stays tokens-only rather than silently apply the short-context row.

Tiered by request input length (>272K input tokens: 2x input and 1.5x output for the full request) and separately bills cache writes at 1.25x uncached input. The flat PriceRow/normalized-usage path cannot determine both the request tier and cache-write amount, so a single row would under-report some requests (SPEC-0005 R1, I2); it stays tokens-only.
